attacking_style: Explosive late-stage climber who attacks in the final 200m of summit finishes. Capable of surging past rivals with raw climbing power rather than early positioning.
team_tactics: Insufficient data to establish clear team tactical patterns. Appears capable of winning without optimal team setup.
terrain_preference: Summit finishes where pure climbing prowess can overcome positioning deficits. Strong on final climbs where raw power matters more than tactical positioning.
vulnerability: Pre-climb positioning appears weak, requiring exceptional climbing ability to compensate. May struggle when perfect positioning is mandatory.
key_patterns: Wins from poor positioning using superior climbing power rather than tactical setup.
Demonstrates tactical maturity and composure when recovering from disadvantageous situations.
Delivers winning attacks in final 200m of climbs with explosive finishing speed.
form_trajectory: positive: showed ability to win stage races and overcome tactical errors with climbing strength
